final:
module RefModule(input wire sysclock,input wire [31:0] inputMulA,output reg [63:0] product);initial begin 
  product <= 64'd0; 
 end 
   wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ (posedge sysclock or posedge dbg_halt) begin 
  product <= (inputMulA * inputMulA); 
 end 
 endmodule
